productDisplayName: Reebok Men Grey Real Flex Sports Shoes
description: A running shoe that's in touch with your foot, the reebok Realflex has 76 sensors to deliver multi-directional flexibility and optimal foot feel on the outsole. The flexibility of the shoes can really be noticed when standing on ones toes, so these shoes are great for both sprinting (on the toes), or easy distance (midfoot or heel). A runner who puts in a lot of miles each week will appreciate this shoe because it's lightweight and comfortable. On the other hand, a moderate runner will appreciate this shoe because they're not footing extra weight as is the case with some of the heavier running shoes.UpperMesh upper with soft felt overlays Soft, mesh liningLacing system for a customised FitPadded tongue and collar for snug fit Padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for a cushioned ride OutsoleFlexible TPU outsole with multidirectional waffle patterned lugsOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
